verdict.summary: Guide is useful but contains several material inaccuracies about PLA eligibility, citizenship language requirements, public-school courses, IEFP subsidies, and some outdated/misleading learning-resource claims.

issues.current: Бесплатно для **всех** иностранцев с любым статусом (включая беженцев и нерезидентов)
issues.problem: Too broad. PLA courses are not simply free for every foreigner with any status, especially not generic non-residents. Access is aimed at adult migrants, refugees/asylum seekers and beneficiaries of temporary protection, usually with a legal/documented status in Portugal or a process that allows enrolment. Availability also depends on local course openings and vacancies.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Бесплатно для взрослых мигрантов в Португалии, включая беженцев, просителей убежища и лиц с временной защитой; на практике при записи могут попросить документ о легальном пребывании/процессе и NIF/NISS/контакты. Это не гарантированный курс для любого нерезидента — зависит от мест и набора."

issues.current: BR понимают — но на A2 для гражданства нужен PT-PT.
issues.problem: Misleading. Portuguese nationality law requires proof of sufficient knowledge of the Portuguese language, normally at A2 or higher; it does not say the language must be specifically European Portuguese. CAPLE/CIPLE is based on European Portuguese, but the legal requirement is Portuguese language knowledge, and there are other recognised forms of proof such as Portuguese schooling/certificates.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Для гражданства нужен документально подтверждённый португальский минимум A2. Экзамен CIPLE/CAPLE в Португалии ориентирован на европейский португальский, поэтому для подготовки к экзамену лучше PT-PT; но закон не формулирует требование как ‘только PT-PT’."

issues.current: Escolas Secundárias часто имеют вечерние курсы «Português para Estrangeiros» в рамках PLNM — за символическую запись (10-25 €/семестр).
issues.problem: Conflates different systems. PLNM is primarily the school subject/support framework for non-native pupils in basic/secondary education, not a general adult evening-course system. Adult Portuguese courses in public schools are more commonly PLA/EFA/Qualifica-linked, and fees/availability are not reliably 10–25 €/semester.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Некоторые государственные школы и Agrupamentos de Escolas проводят PLA/EFA/курсы для взрослых через Centros Qualifica или местные программы. Наличие, расписание и возможные административные сборы зависят от школы/муниципалитета; PLNM как правило относится к ученикам школьной системы, а не к взрослым экспатам."

issues.current: Бесплатно + bolsa de formação (субсидия, часть IAS), покрывают транспорт и питание
issues.problem: Overpromises. IEFP training supports are conditional. Not every unemployed person receives a bolsa de formação; eligibility depends on registration status, course type, unemployment benefits, household situation and IEFP rules. Meal/transport allowances also have conditions and documentation requirements.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Курс может быть бесплатным; при соблюдении условий IEFP возможны apoios sociais à formação: subsídio de alimentação, transporte и иногда bolsa de formação. Размер и право на выплаты зависят от статуса в IEFP и от того, получаете ли вы другие пособия."
issues.source: IEFP Regulamento dos Apoios Sociais à Formação Profissional

issues.current: Идеально для тех, кто только приехал и ещё не работает
issues.problem: Misleading without caveat. A newcomer usually needs to be able to register with IEFP, which normally requires legal residence/valid visa or residence process, tax/social security details, and employability in Portugal. It is not automatically available to every newly arrived person.
issues.suggestion: Add: "Подходит, если вы уже можете зарегистрироваться в IEFP как desempregado/à procura de emprego и имеете документы, позволяющие жить и работать/искать работу в Португалии."

issues.problem: Imprecise institutional description. PLA is not simply an 'AIMA + education' programme. Courses are delivered through public schools, IEFP training centres and other certified entities, under education/employment/training frameworks; AIMA may publicise/integration-support it but is not the sole operational authority.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Государственная программа Português Língua de Acolhimento, проводимая через escolas/centros de formação/entidades certificadas, с участием структур образования, занятости и интеграции."

issues.problem: Potentially confusing. PLA is commonly structured as 150 hours for A1+A2 and 150 hours for B1+B2. Saying '300 hours for B1/B2' can be read as the B1/B2 module alone being 300 hours.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Обычно 150 ч для A1+A2 и ещё 150 ч для B1+B2; итого около 300 ч от нуля до B2."

issues.problem: Linguistically inaccurate. In European Portuguese, 'vocês' is the normal plural 'you' and is not specifically formal; for formal singular address people often use 'o senhor/a senhora' or title + name. 'Você' in Portugal can be neutral in some contexts but also sounds distant/rude depending on region/social context.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Обращение: в BR você очень обычное; в PT с você осторожно — часто используют имя, o senhor/a senhora для формального обращения, а vocês — обычное множественное ‘вы’."

issues.current: 🎬 Фильмы: бразильские фильмы всегда с субтитрами в PT — noticias PT не показываются в BR без перевода
issues.problem: The statement is confusing and factually overbroad. Brazilian films are not 'always' subtitled into European Portuguese, and Portuguese news/content is generally intelligible to Brazilian audiences without translation, though accents and vocabulary differ.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Медиа: бразильского контента гораздо больше, но для уха в Португалии полезнее слушать RTP/SIC/TVI, podcasts и сериалы с европейским акцентом. Субтитры и локализация зависят от платформы."

issues.problem: Likely inaccurate for Pimsleur European Portuguese. Pimsleur's European Portuguese offering has historically been much smaller than Brazilian Portuguese and is commonly listed as one level/around 30 lessons, not 90. The catalogue changes, so this should be verified before giving a hard number.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Audio-only курс; проверьте актуальное число lessons на сайте Pimsleur, потому что European Portuguese обычно имеет меньше уровней, чем Brazilian Portuguese."

issues.problem: Possibly outdated. italki's old community/notebook correction features have changed over time and may not be available in the same form to all users. This should not be presented as a reliable current feature without verification.
issues.suggestion: Write: "italki/HelloTalk/Tandem сообщества — иногда можно получить исправления от носителей; проверьте актуальные функции приложения."

issues.current: **Soap operas** — TVI / SIC вечером, напр. «Quero é Viver»
issues.problem: Outdated example. 'Quero é Viver' was a TVI telenovela from 2022 and is not a current evening example in 2026, unless referring to archives/reruns.
issues.suggestion: Write: "TVI/SIC/RTP telenovelas и programas da atualidade; выбирайте текущие выпуски или архивы на RTP Play/OPTO/TVI Player."

issues.current: **Разговор с bairro neighbours** — señhor/senhora в кафе, продавец в padaria
issues.problem: Typo/wrong language: 'señhor' is Spanish-looking and misspelled. Portuguese is 'senhor/senhora'.

Too generic for a sensitive official claim. The guide makes specific statements about PLA eligibility, hours and certificates but cites only the AIMA homepage. A deep link to the official PLA page and/or IEFP/DGEstE/ANQEP page is needed.
issues.suggestion: Use official deep links for PLA, for example the AIMA/ACM PLA information page plus IEFP's 'Português Língua de Acolhimento' page and the governing Portaria n.º 183/2020.

issues.problem: The relevant exam body for CIPLE/CAPLE is CAPLE/Faculdade de Letras da Universidade de Lisboa; Instituto Camões is not the best primary source for CIPLE fees, dates and registration. The guide already cites CAPLE, so this source should either be made specific or removed.
issues.suggestion: For CIPLE exam information, cite CAPLE directly: exam descriptions, calendário, propinas and centros de exame pages.

missing_topics: Clarify accepted language-proof routes for Portuguese nationality: CIPLE/CAPLE A2, recognised school certificates, PLA certificate, Portuguese schooling, and exemptions where applicable.
Mention that the 2026 nationality-law reform was approved on 01.04.2026 but is still awaiting promulgation/publication, so language requirements should be rechecked before applying.
Add practical warning that PLA places can have long waiting lists and schedules vary heavily by municipality.
Add that PLA certificate usefulness depends on completing the correct level/module and receiving an official certificate with the required level, not merely attending classes.
Add CAPLE practicalities: registration windows, limited seats, exam centres, ID requirements, and that fees/dates should be checked on CAPLE for the year of the exam.
Add official IEFP caveat that training subsidies are conditional and not guaranteed for every registered unemployed person.
